title: Artifact Manifest
description: Declares what inputs were actually available for a run, which DETERMINES the observability level (and therefore the ceiling on finding severity). Built first, before the ledger. See references/observability-levels.md.

observability_level.description: Derived from which artifacts are present (the rule lives in references/observability-levels.md).

rerunnable.description: v0 never sets this true — we do not claim reproduction.
